annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window-to-zone tracking: pre-snap geometry for restore, floating state, zone geometry, drag-out unsnap, resolution-change handling, keyboard-navigation feedback, and window-metadata registration. Snap commits, snap-restore fallback chains, and daemon-driven navigation targets live on the org.plasmazones.Snap adaptor.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Notify that a snapped window was dragged without the activation trigger. Saves pre-float zone, marks floating, and clears zone assignment so the window does not auto-restore to the zone on close/reopen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window ID from the effect.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the zone UUID a window is snapped to, or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all zone UUIDs a window spans (multi-zone snap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUIDs the window spans.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return window IDs currently snapped to the given zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window IDs snapped to the zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all window IDs that are snapped to any zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: All snapped window IDs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Remove zone assignments for windows not in the alive set. Called by KWin effect after daemon ready to clean up stale KConfig entries.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window IDs currently known to KWin.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return typed list of empty zones for Snap Assist continuation. Same EmptyZoneEntry format as the WindowDrag interface's snapAssistReady signal.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier (e.g. Dell:U2722D:115107 or Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of EmptyZoneEntry structs: (zoneId, x, y, width, height, borderWidth, borderRadius, useCustomColors, highlightColor, inactiveColor, borderColor, activeOpacity, inactiveOpacity).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the last zone a window was snapped to (for auto-snap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Last used zone UUID or empty string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Store window geometry before tiling (snap or autotile). If overwrite is false (snap mode), skips if entry exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window X position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window Y position.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window width.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window height.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen connector name where window is located (for cross-screen restore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: If false, skip if entry exists (snap). If true, always overwrite (autotile).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return true if pre-tile geometry is stored for the window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if pre-tile geometry exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return pre-tile geometry (pre-snap or pre-autotile) validated against current screen bounds (adjusts off-screen). Returns found, x, y, width, height.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if geometry was found and validated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: X position (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Y position (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Width (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Height (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear stored pre-tile geometry for a window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set whether a window is floating (not snapped).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to float.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return true if the window is floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return all window IDs that are floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Floating window IDs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the zone to restore to when unfloating (if any).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if a pre-float zone was stored.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone to restore to (if found).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear saved pre-float zone for the window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone geometry for the given zone (primary screen).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: ZoneGeometryRect: (x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return zone geometry for the given zone on the given screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier (e.g. Dell:U2722D:115107 or Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: ZoneGeometryRect: (x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return updated window geometries after resolution change.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of (windowId, x, y, width, height, screenId). Matches the marshalling format in libs/phosphor-protocol/src/marshalling.cpp — the trailing screenId field was added alongside applyGeometriesBatch's (siiiis) signature so the effect can route the geometry to the correct screen on multi-monitor setups.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Pre-computed zone geometries for pending restore entries. The effect caches these for instant window teleport on open (no D-Bus round-trip flash).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object: { appId: {x, y, width, height}, ... }

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Report keyboard-navigation result from KWin effect; daemon emits navigationFeedback for OSD.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if navigation succeeded.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Action name (e.g. move, focus).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reason string (e.g. no adjacent zone).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Source zone ID for OSD highlighting (optional).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target zone ID for OSD highlighting (optional).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier where navigation occurred (for OSD placement).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a window's zone assignment changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone UUID (or empty if unsnapped).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when KWin effect reports navigation result via reportNavigationFeedback (for OSD).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if navigation succeeded.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Action name (e.g. move, focus).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Reason string (e.g. no adjacent zone).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Source zone ID for OSD highlighting.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target zone ID for OSD highlighting.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier where navigation occurred (for OSD placement).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the daemon's layout becomes available and there are pending zone restores. The KWin effect should retry restoring untracked windows when receiving this signal.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted after panel geometry has settled so the KWin effect should call getUpdatedWindowGeometries and apply those geometries to snapped windows. Fixes shifted windows after closing the KDE panel editor.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a window's floating state changes (e.g., when a floating window is drag-snapped). The KWin effect should listen to this to keep its local floating cache in sync.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New floating state.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where the window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a window's floating state explicitly (directional, not toggle). Routes to autotile engine for autotile screens, handles snap mode locally. Used by minimize/unminimize, drag-to-float, and monocle unmaximize.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier (from KWin).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to float, false to unfloat.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests compositor to apply geometry. zoneId empty = float restore only; zoneId set = apply and call windowSnapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to activate (focus) a window. Used by daemon-driven focus/cycle navigation.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to activate.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to move a window to a virtual desktop. Used by cross-desktop directional move; the effect calls windowToDesktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window to move.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Target virtual desktop (1-based).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-initiated cross-output move: the daemon already migrated its tiling state for the window onto targetScreenId and reflowed both outputs. The window's resulting outputChanged is expected; the effect updates bookkeeping and decoration only, without re-issuing windowClosed/windowOpened. User-drag cross-output moves carry no marker.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window the daemon moved across outputs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Destination screen the daemon migrated the window onto.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests compositor to apply geometries for a batch of windows.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of (windowId, x, y, width, height, screenId). screenId is the daemon-authoritative target screen — compositor uses it to seed its tracked-screen cache without re-deriving from geometry. Empty screenId means no authoritative answer (fall back to geometry-based resolution).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Navigation action type (rotate, resnap, vs_reconfigure) for feedback.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon requests KWin to raise windows in order (z-order restoration).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Ordered list of window IDs (bottom-to-top).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Report that the cursor has moved to a different screen. Called by KWin effect when cursor crosses monitor boundaries.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen identifier the cursor is now on (e.g. Dell:U2722D:115107 or Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Register or update metadata for a live window. Called by the compositor bridge on window-added and on every mutation of the window's app class, desktop file, caption, virtual desktop, activity, or role. Idempotent — safe to call on every observation; a no-op if metadata is unchanged.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Opaque compositor handle, stable for the window lifetime (KWin internalId).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Current app class (mutable).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Current desktop file name (mutable, may be empty).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Current caption (mutable, may be empty).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: X11 WM_WINDOW_ROLE (empty for Wayland-native windows).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Process id (0 = unknown).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: 1-based x11 desktop number (0 = all desktops / unknown).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Activity UUID (empty = all activities / unknown).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: PhosphorProtocol::WindowType underlying value; out-of-range values are clamped to Unknown.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Extended window-property snapshot (state flags, geometry, accessory flags, captionNormal) keyed by PhosphorProtocol::Service::WindowMetadataKey. A key is present only when the value is known, so absent keys leave the derived window-rule field disengaged. Lets the daemon's Float/RestorePosition resolvers match the same KWin-property fields the effect path resolves live.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Notify daemon that a window was closed (cleanup). The window's structural kind is captured into the PendingRestore entry if one is recorded, so the consume path can refuse to assign that entry to a window of a different kind on reopen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Structural kind of the closing window (0=Unknown, 1=Normal, 2=Transient). Recorded on the PendingRestore entry if one is enqueued. Pass 0 to opt out of the gate (legacy callers).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: The window's authoritative current screen at close (KWin's getWindowScreenId). Used by the final placement capture to record the float-back on the screen the window actually closed on, even when a cross-screen move has torn down both engines' tracking. Empty opts out (legacy callers).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Notify daemon that a window was activated/focused.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where window is located.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Push current frame geometry for a window into the daemon's shadow. Called by the compositor plugin on windowFrameGeometryChanged (debounced). Enables daemon-local shortcut handlers (e.g. float toggle) to read fresh geometry without a cross-process round-trip.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set whether a window is sticky (visible on all virtual desktops).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if window is on all desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Record that a window moved to a different screen. The daemon compares the new screen against the window's stored snap assignment and unsnaps if they differ — heuristic for distinguishing a user-initiated cross-screen drag from a programmatic resnap (programmatic moves assign the zone first, so the stored screen matches and no unsnap occurs).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Identifier of the screen the window moved to.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Query the daemon's authoritative floating state for a window. The effect uses this on bringup to reconcile its local cache against persisted state across daemon restarts.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the daemon currently has the window marked as floating.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return every persisted pre-tile geometry (appId → rect + screen). The effect pre-populates its local cache from this on bringup so it can teleport restoring windows to their pre-tile geometry without a round-trip on every restore. Each entry carries the appId (entries persist across window close/reopen for session restore, so the per-instance windowId is not the key), the geometry rect (x,y,w,h), and the screen the geometry was captured on.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of (appId, x, y, width, height, screenId) — the same marshalling shape as applyGeometriesBatch and getUpdatedWindowGeometries.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Re-drive each placement engine's per-window decoration inputs (snap border / hidden title bar, autotile border) for every window it manages. The compositor effect calls this after (re)registering its bridge so a freshly-(re)started effect converges on the daemon's authoritative appearance without waiting for the next natural change. Window-rule decoration overrides flow separately via the WindowRules rulesChanged broadcast.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when snap-all-windows shortcut is triggered. KWin effect should collect unsnapped windows and call calculateSnapAllWindows (on org.plasmazones.Snap).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen to operate on.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a specific window (e.g. from Snap Assist) should be moved to a zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get comprehensive state for a single window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window identifier.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: WindowStateEntry: (windowId, zoneId, screenId, isFloating, changeType, zoneIds, isSticky).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get state for all tracked windows (TUI dashboard).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of WindowStateEntry structs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Unified window state change stream. Emitted on snap, unsnap, float, unfloat, and screen change events.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window whose state changed.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: WindowStateEntry: (windowId, zoneId, screenId, isFloating, changeType, zoneIds, isSticky). changeType: snapped, unsnapped, floated, unfloated, screen_changed.
